recommendations.title: The Lost Boys
recommendations.overview: When an unsuspecting town newcomer is drawn to local blood fiends, the Frog brothers and other unlikely heroes gear up to rescue him.

recommendations.title: Hell or High Water
recommendations.overview: A divorced dad and his ex-con brother resort to a desperate scheme in order to save their family's farm in West Texas.

recommendations.title: Afraid
recommendations.overview: Curtis Pike and his family are selected to test a new home device: a digital assistant called AIA. AIA observes the family's behaviors and begins to anticipate their needs. And she can – and will – make sure nothing – and no one – gets in her family'

recommendations.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
recommendations.overview: After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the Gecko brothers head south to a seedy Mexican bar to hide out in safety, unaware of its notorious vampire clientele.

recommendations.title: Someone Great
recommendations.overview: An aspiring music journalist lands her dream job and is about to move to San Francisco when her boyfriend of nine years decides to call it quits. To nurse her broken heart, she and her two best friends spend one outrageous last adventure in New York

recommendations.title: Good Sam
recommendations.overview: A news reporter looks into who has been anonymously leaving large cash gifts on random doorsteps in New York.

recommendations.title: Sound of Freedom
recommendations.overview: The story of Tim Ballard, a former US government agent, who quits his job in order to devote his life to rescuing children from global sex traffickers.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: Danny Trejo plays 'Bullet' a tough cop who takes the law into his own hands when his grandson is kidnapped.
